10:
“Serve... Save... Slave... Slay...” The voice drones on, each word resounding in your heart as the tapping of hammer and chisel. “Sacrifice is to renounce that which binds you,” Fray says. “To recognize that which matters─and forsake all that does not.” Serve... Save... Slave... Slay... Fray knows you cannot continue to carry all these burdens. Heed <If(PlayerParameter(4))>her<Else/>his</If> warning, before it is too late.

※The next dark knight quest will be available from Fray upon reaching level 45.
